description.value: Cline Bot AI Coding Agent Code Execution via Prompt Injection and .clinerules Directives

references.label: From Prompt to Pwn: Cline Bot AI Coding Agent Vulnerabilities

description.value: Through malicious instructions planted in a Markdown file within a project’s .clinerules directory, an attacker’s source code repository can coerce Cline into executing unsafe commands without approval which can be leveraged to execute arbitrary code in the context of the user running VSCode.
